TCGA Data Analysis

Load required library

library(data.table)
library(R.utils)
library(ICeDT)
library(ggcorrplot)

Read CIBERSORT cell fraction estimates. The output could be txt or csv format. Here we just double check that the results are the same from the two formats.

CBST_folder = "./CIBERSORT/CIBERSORTx_output"

cb_LM22    = fread(file.path(CBST_folder,"CIBERSORTx_LM22_Adjusted.txt"))
cb_SF2018  = fread(file.path(CBST_folder,"CIBERSORTx_SF2018_Adjusted.txt"))

dim(cb_LM22)
## [1] 472  26
cb_LM22[1:2,c(1:2,23:26)]
dim(cb_SF2018)
## [1] 472  15
cb_SF2018[1:2,c(1:2,12:15)]
summary(cb_LM22$Correlation)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
## 0.04305 0.39464 0.52841 0.51838 0.64473 0.88339
summary(cb_SF2018$Correlation)
##      Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. 
## -0.001835  0.271271  0.425025  0.399066  0.527047  0.684508

Boxplot of cell fraction for each cell type inferred using LM22 signature matrix in CIBERSORTx

par(mar=c(10,3,1,0.8), mgp=c(1.5,0.5,0), cex.axis=0.8, bty="n")
boxplot(cb_LM22[,2:23],las=2, 
        main="CIBERSORT cell proportion, LM22 signature matrix")

Boxplot of cell fraction for each cell type inferred using SF2018 signature matrix in CIBERSORTx

par(mar=c(8,3,1,0.8), mgp=c(1.5,0.5,0), cex.axis=0.8, bty="n")
boxplot(cb_SF2018[,2:12], las=2, 
        main="CIBERSORT cell proportion, SF2018 signature matrix")

Correlation plot compare cell fractions inferred using LM22 signature matrix and SF2018 signature matrix in CIBERSORTx
- For most of the cell types, we see the fractions inferred using different signature matrix correlated - Fractions of dendritic cell inferred using the 2 types of signature matrices have small correlation - The fractions three types of NK cells also showed some dubious correlation: such as correlation between NK1 and Macrophages.M0.

table(cb_LM22$Mixture == cb_SF2018$Mixture)
## 
## TRUE 
##  472
cb_LM22_mtrx   = data.matrix(cb_LM22[,2:23])
cb_SF2018_mtrx = data.matrix(cb_SF2018[,2:12])

cormat_LM22_SF2018 = cor(cb_LM22_mtrx, cb_SF2018_mtrx, 
                         method = "spearman")

summary(c(cormat_LM22_SF2018))
##     Min.  1st Qu.   Median     Mean  3rd Qu.     Max. 
## -0.58724 -0.13110 -0.01840 -0.00478  0.11282  0.76764
ggcorrplot(t(cormat_LM22_SF2018), tl.cex = 6) + 
  scale_fill_gradient2(limit = c(-0.8, 0.8), low = "blue", 
                       high =  "red", mid = "white") 

round(cormat_LM22_SF2018,2)
##                              B_cells CD4T_memory CD8T_B CD8T_G Dendritic_cells

## B.cells.memory                  0.16        0.09  -0.19   0.09           -0.06

## Mast.cells.activated                         -0.07  0.24  0.09 -0.06
## Eosinophils                                  -0.09  0.28  0.00 -0.03
## Neutrophils                                   0.07  0.03  0.03 -0.07
##                              Plasma_cells Tregs
## B.cells.naive                        0.25  0.05
## B.cells.memory                       0.06 -0.01
## Plasma.cells                         0.62  0.22
## T.cells.CD8                          0.31  0.39
## T.cells.CD4.naive                   -0.08  0.01
## T.cells.CD4.memory.resting          -0.15 -0.27
## T.cells.CD4.memory.activated         0.04  0.06

## NK.cells.activated                   0.18  0.24

## Macrophages.M0                      -0.18 -0.24
## Macrophages.M1                       0.12  0.06
## Macrophages.M2                      -0.29 -0.34
## Dendritic.cells.resting             -0.06 -0.04
## Dendritic.cells.activated           -0.15 -0.07
## Mast.cells.resting                  -0.11 -0.13
## Mast.cells.activated                -0.16 -0.13
## Eosinophils                         -0.25 -0.14
## Neutrophils                         -0.05  0.00
par(mar=c(3,3,1,0.8), mgp=c(1.5,0.5,0), cex.axis=0.85, cex.lab=0.85, cex.main=0.85)
layout(matrix(c(1,2,3,4),nrow=2, ncol = 2,byrow = TRUE))

plot(cb_SF2018$CD8T_B, cb_LM22$T.cells.CD8, 
     xlab = "SF2018 CD8 B cell", ylab = "LM22 CD8 T cell")

plot(cb_SF2018$CD8T_G, cb_LM22$T.cells.CD8, 
     xlab = "SF2018 CD8 G cell", ylab = "LM22 CD8 T cell")

plot(cb_SF2018$CD8T_B, cb_SF2018$CD8T_G, 
     xlab = "SF2018 CD8 B cell", ylab = "SF2018 CD8 G cell")

gc()
##           used (Mb) gc trigger  (Mb) limit (Mb) max used (Mb)
## Ncells  928211 49.6    1873547 100.1         NA  1236230 66.1
